# CWE-356 vulnerable — Product UI does not Warn User of Unsafe Actions
lang: go
file: CWE-356-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
	Writer  http.ResponseWriter
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Delete(value interface{}, conds ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func PurgeTenant(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	tenant := c.Request.URL.Query().Get("tenant")
	db.Delete(nil, "DELETE FROM tenants WHERE slug = ?", tenant)
	c.Writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = c.Writer.Write([]byte(`{"purged":true}`))
	return nil
}
